finding_results.notes: Collapsed repetitive anaphora to one primary 'He learned' chain in the work-floor observation beat, preserved one deliberate negation ladder in the Theo/June beat, and recast other flagged lines into distinct sentence shapes tied to body and scene motion.

summary: All prose/copyedit packet findings were addressed in-place with minimal churn: recurrent anaphora/negation formulas were diversified, and Eli's repeated stress-accounting interiority was varied so only one explicit ledger beat remains while stakes stay concrete and unsanitized.
